ideation: This sequence will depict a robot reacting to a sudden thunderstorm, using exaggerated arm movements to convey surprise and perhaps a little fear. The animation will start with arms at the sides, then transition to arms raised in a defensive posture, and finally end with a slight shiver or tremor.  The use of both arms will amplify the emotional impact. I will use the existing examples as a guide for creating realistic and expressive movements for the robot.

frames.beat: arms hang low, anticipating the storm
both arms shoot up defensively, startled by thunder
the right arm lowers slightly, bracing for impact
both arms tremble, caught in the storm's fury
